description: Curated tool manuals & parameter notes with official documentation links (offline RAG).

tools.name: Kraken 2
when_to_use: Fast k-mer screening before marker-gene tools
Viral / custom DB screens when DB is indexed

key_params.--db: Path to Kraken 2 database (must contain hash.k2d, opts.k2d, taxo.k2d)
key_params.--memory-mapping: Prefer for multi-sample runs sharing one DB
key_params.--report: Standard Kraken report for Bracken / MultiQC

pitfalls: Unindexed or incomplete DB → missing_db failures
Results are database-dependent; do not over-interpret species without markers
Pair with MetaPhlAn for higher-precision gut profiles when compute allows

resource_hints.notes: Standard DB may need 30–100+ GB RAM

tools.name: GTDB-Tk
when_to_use: Taxonomic assignment of MAGs / bins after CheckM2 QC
Standardize prokaryotic taxonomy to GTDB releases

key_params.classify_wf: End-to-end classify workflow on genome directory
key_params.GTDBTK_DATA_PATH: Required env pointing to GTDB-Tk reference data

pitfalls: Requires large reference data download; set GTDBTK_DATA_PATH
Run after CheckM2; filter low-completeness / high-contamination bins first
Not a substitute for read-level profilers (Kraken2/MetaPhlAn)

tools.name: Bakta
when_to_use: Rapid prokaryotic genome / MAG annotation (CDS, rRNA, tRNA, CRISPR)
Prefer over legacy Prokka for up-to-date DB when available
pitfalls: Needs Bakta DB download; keep DB version pinned for reproducibility
Eukaryotic / viral genomes need different annotators

tools.name: CheckM2
when_to_use: Estimate MAG completeness and contamination after binning
Gate bins before GTDB-Tk / Bakta / publication

key_params.--input: Directory of bins or genome files

pitfalls: Needs CheckM2 DIAMOND DB; first-run download can fail offline
Common gates: completeness ≥50% and contamination ≤10% (medium quality); ≥90%/≤5% high quality
Do not interpret taxonomy from CheckM2 alone

tools.name: FastQC
when_to_use: Per-sample raw read QC before trimming
pitfalls: Adapter content / per-base quality inform Trimmomatic/fastp settings

tools.name: Trimmomatic
when_to_use: Adapter/quality trimming when fastp is unavailable
pitfalls: Prefer tool-specific adapter files; verify PE vs SE mode
